entries.name: push-prune-expired
entries.purpose: Daily 03:45 UTC: soft-delete idle subscriptions (last_seen_at < now() - 90d) + hard-purge soft-deleted > 30d.

entries.name: push-validate-stale-tokens
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 05 UTC: revalidate 5% of subscriptions with last_seen_at older than 30d. Proactively catches revoked tokens before they consume send budget.
